docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,440.00 FILED BY DERE, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HWANG, GENE C/O ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT WESLEY DERE. DEFENDANT ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GENE HWANG. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DERE, WESLEY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT HWANG, GENE C/O ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED OCT-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HWANG, GENE C/O ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF DERE, WESLEY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DERE, WESLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HWANG, GENE C/O ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $0 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
